name: Turkey Low Mein
recipeIngredient: 2 cups turkey (10 oz), thin strips, cooked
8 ounces spaghetti (8 oz), cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-size bowl, mix chicken broth, soy sauce, cornstarch, and garlic.
2. Add turkey; toss to coat.
3. Heat oil in a 4-quart Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
4. Add bell pepper, green onion, and frozen sugar-snap peas. Stir-fry for 4 to 5 minutes until vegetables are tender-crisp.
5. Toss turkey again; add to vegetables and bring to a boil.
6. Boil for 1 minute; add cooked spaghetti and toss gently to mix and coat.
7. Cook for 1 to 2 minutes, if needed, until spaghetti is heated through.
Serves 4
You could also add some curls of carrots, done by potato peeler, at the same time you add green onion and peas.
